page_metadata.biotools__summary: Protein sequence alignment viewed as sequence logos. The total height of the sequence information part is computed as the relative entropy between the observed fractions of a given symbol and the respective a priori probabilities.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Protein sequence alignment viewed as sequence logos. The total height of the sequence information part is computed as the relative entropy between the observed fractions of a given symbol and the respective a priori probabilities.
